questions.subject: Fluid Mechanics & Hydraulics
questions.stem: Flow in an open channel is critical when the Froude number is

questions.subject: Fluid Mechanics & Hydraulics
questions.stem: Bernoulli's equation is an expression of the conservation of
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Bernoulli = energy conservation along a streamline.

**Working.**
Energy.

**Answer.** Energy

questions.subject: Fluid Mechanics & Hydraulics
questions.stem: A floating body is in stable equilibrium when
options: the metacentre is above the centre of gravity
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Stable floating: M above G, $GM>0$.

**Working.**
Options 1 and 2.

**Answer.** M above G, $GM>0$
